title: Quickish Question spoilers
wikitext:
[]: Quick(ish) Question (spoilers)             Quote Post by bluehair » Fri Jan 31, 2014 10:39 pm Hello! I'm new here and planning on stick around. So, I've watched all of the original series, EoE and I've read the manga. I'm watching the Rebuilds right now, and there's something that's been bugging me lately. When is it actually revealed in the anime/manga that Rei has Lilith's soul and Kaoru, Adam's? I just thought that Kaworu was the final child of Adam, though I suppose I should have thought differently when reading the manga; seeing as it discussed his being bio-genetically engineered, perhaps I just wasn't paying enough attention. Regardless, my question stands. Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Gorbatschow » Sun Feb 02, 2014 10:49 am That's anything but Quickenish. (Maybe this is better preserved in Discussion) It's heavily implied through the whole show, but the only concrete "evidences" I could find are the following: Regarding Kaworu: Episode 21' Man E: " The contact experiment with the donor is scheduled for the 13th of next month. There will be time for any adjustments." Woman B: "The genes that dived into Adam have already undergone physical fusion!" [Source] Episode 24 SEELE A: [Adam's] salvaged soul exists only within you. [Source] CI: "At the time of Second Impact, [Adam's] body was torn apart, and its soul flew off somewhere as a result. Adam's soul was later recovered by SEELE and incarnated." [Source] Regarding Rei: Episode 24: Kaworu: You're the First Child, aren't you? Rei: *Silence* Kaworu: You're the same as me. So, both of us ended up in the same form as the Lilim while we inhabit this planet. Episode 24: Rei: Why am I here? Why am I alive again? For what? And for whom? The Fifth Child... That boy... I feel as if he's the same as me. Why? Rei III discovers she possesses the soul of Lilith as evidenced by her actions in this episode. Rei III produces an AT Field strong enough to block out all subatomic particles and electromagnetic radiation, including light. [Source] End of Evangelion: Rei is entering Lilith.) Rei: I'm home. Lilith(Text): Welcome home. Furthermore most of the stuff that happens (not only during) EoE would make no sense if Rei wouldn't posses Lilith's soul. - First of all Kaworu was basically SEELE's "Instrumentality-remote" and possessed Adam's soul. That's on one side the reason why Rei considered him "same as her" and on the other side would Gendo be rather dumb if he betrayed SEELE without Lilith's Soul. (Lilith obviusly didn't possess her soul during the show see the last point) - Rei is a clone of Yui Ikari, but doesn't posses her soul, because Yui's soul was needed for EVA-01. - Rei was created in the first place because Gendo wanted to start Instrumentality without actually becoming "god", in order to meet Yui again. Therefore he created Rei as a tool to do so. He needed Adam's soul and body, Lilith's soul and body and a "proxy" (Rei) (Apparently EVA-01 and the MP-EVA are needed too) . - Every vessel (every Rei) possesses only a part of the soul, evidenced by the mono-/dialogue in Episode 23, that fuses again with the other parts after it died, causing different personalities after every death. [Source (Ep 23)] - Lastly Lilith would be able to do anything if she'd still posses her soul. But it still remains rather cryptic and I probably oversaw something quite huge. Can anyone with more notion than me help us ?

Article: Quickish Question spoilers
 Rei III discovers she possesses the soul of Lilith as evidenced by her actions in this episode. Rei III produces an AT Field strong enough to block out all subatomic particles and electromagnetic radiation, including light. [Source] End of Evangelion: Rei is entering Lilith.) Rei: I'm home. Lilith(Text): Welcome home. Furthermore most of the stuff that happens (not only during) EoE would make no sense if Rei wouldn't posses Lilith's soul. - First of all Kaworu was basically SEELE's "Instrumentality-remote" and possessed Adam's soul. That's on one side the reason why Rei considered him "same as her" and on the other side would Gendo be rather dumb if he betrayed SEELE without Lilith's Soul. (Lilith obviusly didn't possess her soul during the show see the last point) - Rei is a clone of Yui Ikari, but doesn't posses her soul, because Yui's soul was needed for EVA-01. - Rei was created in the first place because Gendo wanted to start Instrumentality without actually becoming "god", in order to meet Yui again. Therefore he created Rei as a tool to do so. He needed Adam's soul and body, Lilith's soul and body and a "proxy" (Rei) (Apparently EVA-01 and the MP-EVA are needed too) . - Every vessel (every Rei) possesses only a part of the soul, evidenced by the mono-/dialogue in Episode 23, that fuses again with the other parts after it died, causing different personalities after every death. [Source (Ep 23)] - Lastly Lilith would be able to do anything if she'd still posses her soul. But it still remains rather cryptic and I probably oversaw something quite huge. Can anyone with more notion than me help us ?
